name: BaubleBar
why: Dominant accessible fashion jewelry brand competing on personalization, charm customization, and IP collaborations (Disney, NFL). Aggressive promotional strategy with stacked discounts and strong TikTok/UGC presence.

ad_types.description: Multi-card carousel featuring 4-6 complementary jewelry pieces shown as a styled set or 'frequently bought together' bundle. Cards use clean product-on-white backgrounds with item name and price visible. Final card is a CTA slide. Powered by Meta Dynamic Ads with personalized recommendations.
ad_types.why_it_works: Directly boosts AOV by suggesting the full stack. Dynamic targeting means returning visitors see products they already viewed. Swipeable format invites discovery — users who came for earrings end up adding a charm bracelet.

ad_types.type: Static Image Ad with Bold Urgency Text Overlay
ad_types.description: Single product or flat-lay shot with bold promotional text overlay. Copy uses hard urgency: 'Only 2 left!', 'Ends Tonight', 'Extra 50% Off Sale Styles', 'Doorbuster: $10'. BaubleBar logo and 'Shop Now' button at bottom.
ad_types.why_it_works: Scarcity and deadline copy triggers immediate action. Real-time stock data spikes conversion during promotional periods. Simple format is fast to produce and easy to A/B test.

ad_types.description: Short-form vertical video (15-30 seconds) showing charm customization process. Open on bare bracelet/chain, quick cuts of charms being selected and added. Final shot is completed personalized piece on wrist. Heavy hashtag use.
ad_types.why_it_works: Personalization is BaubleBar's core growth driver. Process videos drive 3x replays vs finished product shots. 'Build your own' narrative pulls in self-expression audience.

ad_types.description: Creator-led vertical video in casual authentic style. Creator addresses camera with product hook. Common formats: GRWM, unboxing hauls, charm bracelet collections. Creator uses personal promo code in caption and overlay.
ad_types.why_it_works: Trust-based format. 92% of marketers confirm UGC boosts trust. Personal promo code creates attribution clarity while building urgency. Scales reach without studio production.

ad_types.type: Licensed IP Collection Announcement (Disney / NFL Static and Carousel)
ad_types.description: Product launch creative for co-branded collections. Static hero image shows licensed character/logo integrated into jewelry. Carousels walk through full collection by theme. Limited-edition framing creates urgency without discount.
ad_types.why_it_works: Leverages existing fanbases. BaubleBar's sports division grew 100% YoY. Cultural moment alignment drives earned media alongside paid reach.

visual_style: Bright, playful, and maximalist — 'Embellish Every Day.' Ad creative leans into color saturation, vivid jewelry close-ups, and aspirational-but-accessible lifestyle aesthetic. Warm-lit with natural or studio softbox lighting. Between editorial fashion and approachable lifestyle. Product-forward layouts with jewelry filling majority of frame. Bold sans-serif text overlays prioritizing readability. Licensed IP ads adopt partner's color world while retaining BaubleBar's energetic style.
hooks: Personalization process reveal — opens on bare chain, immediately shows customization action
Hard discount urgency open — 'Extra 50% off sale styles — today only' as the first visual frame
Creator identity hook — 'I need to show you what just arrived from BaubleBar because I've been wearing this every single day'
Aspirational stack / layer reveal — bare wrist, slow-motion layering of charm bracelets one at a time

content_cadence.frequency: Daily Instagram posts, heavy Reels output, Stories during sale windows
content_cadence.promotional_peaks: Presidents Day, Black Friday, Cyber Monday, holiday season, IP collection drops

ugc_creator_strategy.approach: Micro and mid-tier influencer program with unique creator discount codes (BETHENNY15, MAYCE)
ugc_creator_strategy.distribution: Dedicated influencer/promo landing page for code distribution
ugc_creator_strategy.content_types: GRWM, unboxing hauls, charm collection showcases, try-on Reels
ugc_creator_strategy.scale: Multiple active creator codes at any given time

creative_testing_patterns.method: A/B testing urgency copy variants on static ads ('Only 2 left' vs 'Ends Tonight'). Dynamic product carousel personalization via Meta catalog.
creative_testing_patterns.formats_tested: Static urgency ads, DPA carousels, UGC Reels

spend_signals.investment_areas: Dynamic product carousels, urgency statics during sale events, UGC creator content
spend_signals.notable: Heavy stacked-discount promotional strategy (up to 80% off) suggests aggressive performance marketing budget
